name: MESA ROYALTY TRUST/TX
summary: Mesa Royalty Trust is a passive Texas trust created on November 1, 1979, that owns an overriding royalty interest equal to 11.44% of 90% of Net Proceeds from oil and gas properties in the Hugoton field of Kansas and the San Juan Basin fields of New Mexico and Colorado. The Trust converts royalty income to cash and distributes it to unitholders quarterly. It has no employees and is administered by Trustee The Bank of New York Mellon Trust Company, N.A.

products.name: Overriding Royalty Interest
products.description: 11.44% of 90% of Net Proceeds from oil and gas properties in Hugoton field (Kansas) and San Juan Basin (New Mexico and Colorado).

partnerships.description: Operator of the Hugoton Royalty Properties since November 23, 2019; reimburses Trust 59.34% of general and administrative expenses.
Operator of all San Juan Basin New Mexico Properties since July 31, 2017; reimburses Trust 27.45% of general and administrative expenses.

partnerships.partner_name: Simcoe LLC (subsidiary of Mach Natural Resources LP)
partnerships.description: Co-operator of San Juan Basin Colorado Properties; reimburses Trust 1.77% of general and administrative expenses.
Co-operator of certain tracts of the San Juan Basin Colorado Properties.
